library.title: Defterdu
library.subtitle: Eɓɓooje daande maa e gitaar maa, gila e miijo haa e yaltinde.

no_results.title: Alaa eɓɓooje tawaa
no_results.description: Enndu waylude njiylawu walla filtirde ngonka.

empty.title: Defterdu maa ina woodi
empty.description: Fuɗɗoo eɓɓoore hesere gila e fuɗɗoode, walla naatde ƴetta ko njogiɗaa e disko.

project_dialog.title: Eɓɓoore hesere
project_dialog.description: Hokku ɗum innde, cuɓo-ɗaa mbaadi winnditaade.

album.empty: Alaa eɓɓooje e nder ndee albom tawo.
album.delete_confirm_description: Eɓɓooje mumtataa, tan ko jokkondirɗe e " {{name}} ".

delete_project.confirm_description: Ɗuum ittata eɓɓoore ndee e kala ƴettugol e nder mayre. Ɗuum waawaa ustaade.

record.title: Winndito
record.subtitle: Nanngu ƴettugol laaɓngol, ƴeew toɓɓe maa, e rewde binndol ngol.

guide.title: Joɗnde ardiinde
guide.subtitle: Yo coftuɗo oo yahdu e binndol ngol, gila e warngooji haa e konngol haalaaɗo.
guide.unavailable: Joɗnde ardiinde ndee alaa tawo e serveer oo.
guide.select_project_device: Suɓo eɓɓoore e kaɓirgal naatnugol ngam winndude laabi gila ɗoo.
guide.no_record_step: Ɗatal warngooji — alaa ko haani winndeede.
guide.complete_body: A winnditii kala doggol binndol ngol. Hoore wartu e tab Audio eɓɓoore ndee e suɓaade ƴettugol maa ɓurngol welde.

best2min.hint: Doggol semmbe e laaɓal ƴeewndo dow denndaangal ƴettugol ngam yiytude windo mum ɓurngo tiiɗde 2-minit — aɗa waawi haa jooni ƴeewtaade njuuteendi ndii e junngo caggal ɗuum.
best2min.unavailable: Hiisiwal ɓurngal moƴƴude-hojomaaji 2 ngal alaa tawo e ooɗoo serveer.

record.takes_empty: Alaa takes winndaa e ndeeɗoo joɗnde tawo.

no_takes.title: Alaa ƴetta tawo
no_takes.description: Winndu ƴettugol kesol walla naatnu fiilde gonnde.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Odio raw e kala mbaydi gollorndi maa ittu.

export.title: Eksport ƴetta
export.description: Hokkude fiilngo sakkitiingo ummoraade e mbaydi gollorndi.

notes.placeholder: Teskorɗe ɗe mbaydi ndi alaa ko yowitii e ndee eɓɓoore...

lyrics.placeholder: Winndu ɗoo jimɗi ɗii. Huutoro palet gonɗo e bannge ngam naatnude meta-tags Suno.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Binndol jooni ngol lomtotoo ko mbaydi hisnaandi e {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Ɓoɗɗu tagɗo ngam naatnude ɗum e jokkorgal ngal.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Ko selli — ina waawi tawa alaa ko battini e njeñtudi ndii.

prompts.preview_empty: Suɓo template e hebbinde waylooji ɗii ngam yiyde ƴeewndo.
prompts.char_count_warning: Style prompts ko ɓuri 1000 alkule ina mbaawi taƴeede e Suno.

stems.title: Koɗorɗe e gitaar
stems.empty: Oo take seerndaaka tawo. Doggo seertude ngam nande daande e gitaar e nder isolation.
stems.capability_missing: Seerndi iwdi ndii waɗaaka e ooɗoo serveer.
stems.unavailable: Seerndude daande/gitaar alaa tawo e ooɗoo serveer.

import.title: Naatde
import.subtitle: Addu eɓɓooji gonɗi e disko ɗii e nder defterdu nduu.

step1.title: Yiytu foldere
step1.description: Hollit foldere root ndee e eɓɓooje maa e laabi maa.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg tawaaka — piille potɗe wayleede maa njuute.

step2.title: Yiylo geɗe
step2.description: Ƴeewto inɗe, ngonkaaji, e ko naatnetee hade maa tabitinde.

step3.title: Naatde
step3.description: Tabintin ngam ƴettude piille ɗee e sosde eɓɓooje ɗee.
step3.copy_originals: Koppir piille asliije e nder defterdu
step3.done_description: Eɓɓooje les ɗee mbaɗaama e nder defterdu maa.

templates.title: Templaaji
templates.subtitle: Templateeji e meta-tags kuutorteeɗi ngam Suno.

editor.template_hint: Siftor ɗo kala waylo-waylo jeyaa e innde mum taƴnde e jokkorgal ɗiɗi — yeru, waylo-waylo wiyeteengo "genre" wonta genre taƴaaɗo e jokkorgal ɗiɗi udditirgal e jokkorgal ɗiɗi udditirgal.

metatags.title: Meta-taguuji
metatags.subtitle: Tags structurel e style Suno anndi nder jimɗi.

settings.title: Dottaaɗe
settings.subtitle: Kabaaru sisteem, ɗemngal, e ɓuranɗe kuutorteeɗe.
settings.lufs_target_hint: Huutortee ko no miijo fuɗɗorde nde eksport ƴettata. Defaare Suno ina jooɗii hedde -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Suno njiylawu winnditaade
guide.subtitle: No nanngirtee daande e gitaar ƴetta ko heɓata ko ɓuri moƴƴude.
guide.intro: Suno ɓuri moƴƴude ko e tuugnorgal laaɓngal, ngal alaa ko firti. Ndee ɗoo deftere ina hollita peewnugol, toɓɓe paandaale, e binndol winnditaade minitaaji 3–5.

prep.title: Taƴre
prep.body: Winndito e nder suudu safrirdu walla suudu ndu geɗe softuɗe keewɗe (ridooji, tapiiji, comci e nder lowre). Mumtu fanniyankooɓe e kala ko ina humpa. Wartu daande maa fotde hojomaaji 5 hade maa winndude.

levels.title: Toɓɓe : -12 haa -6 dBFS
levels.body: Faandaare mum ko toɓɓe hakkunde -12 e -6 dBFS e dow meeteer. Les oon nokku, ɓuuɓol caggal ina ɓeydoo teskeede ; dow maggal, riis taƴgol ina ɓeydoo. Huutoro meeteer gonɗo e hello Record ngam waɗde gain maa hade maa fuɗɗaade.

distance.title: Woɗɗude mikroo : 15–30 cm
distance.body: Heddo 15 haa 30 cm e mikroo. Ko ɓuri ɓadaade ɗuum ina ɓeyda plosives e batte ɓadtaade ; ko ɓuri woɗɗude ina ƴetta ko ɓuri suudu reverb e noise.

script.title: Binndol winnditaade
script.vowels: Alkule duumotooɗe — a, e, i, o, u
script.excerpt: Ko jimol ngol ƴetti (8 haa 16 bar)
script.dynamics: Dinamiik : fuɗɗoraade softunde, joofde e daande
script.spoken_phrase: Konngol gootol haalaaɗo, mbele Suno ina waawa janngude tonngoode daande maa

expectations.title: Ko Suno ɗaminii
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, yoorɗo (alaa ko woni e mum so wonaa mbaydi mbaylaandi walla batte), ko hojomaaji 3 haa 5 njiylawu. Ko ɓuri laaɓtude, ko ɓuri wakilaade ko hojomaaji 2 e ƴettugol ina heewi waɗde ko ɓuri moƴƴude.

suno_voice_full.name: Binndol daande timmungol ngam Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Hojomaaji 5 njiylotooɗi : warngooji, alkule, njuuteendi, nate ɗiɗi jimɗi, dinamiik, e konngol haalaaɗo.

step.warmup_inst: Loowtu e yawne, e ɓuuɓri leppi (brrr), e ɓuuɓri softundi fotde hojomaaji seeɗa. Alaa ko haani winndude — ko ngam ɓuuɓnude daande maa tan hade maa yimde.
step.vowels_inst: Joggo kala alkulal — a, e, i, o, u — fotde leƴƴanɗe 3 haa 4 e daande maa welnde, tawa aɗa jogii daande ɓuuɓnde. Ɗuum ina wallita Suno ƴettude timbre laaɓɗo daande maa.
step.scales_inst: Yimre njuuteendi koyndi dow e les, e dow "la" walla "na". Alaa e sago ɗum wona timmuɗo — faandaare ndee ko kartal daande maa.
step.section_inst: Yim 8 haa 16 bar e jimɗi ɗii, e anniya goonga mo njiɗɗaa yettinde. Ardin laaɓal e woodde dow timmal karallaagal.
step.section2_inst: Yimde barmeeji goɗɗi 8 haa 16 — ko ɓuri moƴƴude ko koorɗo walla taƴre nde seerti e nde ɓennunde ndee. Feere ɓurnde heewde ina wallita model oo janngude daande maa.
step.dynamics_inst: Yim konngol gootol fuɗɗoraade softude no feewi haa joofna e daande toownde, tawa aɗa ɓuuɓna daande maa. Ɗuum hollirta ko Suno mbaydi daande maa.
step.spoken_inst: Haal — woto yim — konngol juutngol, nafngol, hono no yeewtidirtaa nii. Ɗuum ina wallita Suno anndude timbre daande maa tigi-rigi.

errors.device_busy: Kaɓirgal audio ina huutoree e porogaraam goɗɗo.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg udditaaka — udditaa ɗum ngam waylude ndee fiilde.
errors.permission_denied: Jaɓde saliima ngam laawol dokkaangol ngol.
